source.quote: Messages are delimited by newlines, and MUST NOT contain embedded newlines.

requirements.exclusion: Framing is enforced at capture time: the JSON Lines trace format cannot represent an embedded-newline violation, so a parseable trace is evidence the rule held. Violations surface as capture-time parse failures, not as trace findings.

source.quote: Servers MUST validate the `Origin` header on all incoming connections to prevent DNS rebinding attacks

requirements.exclusion: Judging Origin validation requires the server's configured allowlist, which recorded traces do not carry. Enforced instead as default-on policy in mcp-everything-server and exercised by its transport integration tests (roadmap M2).
